subgraphs.name: Image to Gaussian Splat (TripoSplat)
subgraphs.description: This subgraph takes a single 2D image as input and generates a variable number of 3D Gaussians (up to 262,144) as output, enabling high-quality 3D reconstruction. It is ideal for asset creation, AR/VR, game development, and simulation environments, handling diverse image styles from photos to illustrations.

subgraphs.name: Remove Background (BiRefNet)
subgraphs.description: Removes or replaces image backgrounds using BiRefNet segmentation and alpha compositing.
